description: Array interface for Itasca wall vertices.

functions.name: fill_pos
functions.signature: itasca.vertexarray. fill_pos ( data: array float{vertex , 2} ) → None.
functions.description: Fill an existing array with the vertex location. The array must be the correct shape.

functions.name: fill_vel
functions.signature: itasca.vertexarray. fill_vel ( data: array float{vertex , 2} ) → None.
functions.description: Fill an existing array with the vertex velocity. The array must be the correct shape.

functions.name: ids
functions.description: Get the vertex ids as an array.

functions.name: pos
functions.description: Get a numpy array of the vertex location.

functions.name: set_pos
functions.signature: itasca.vertexarray. set_pos ( data: array float{vertex , 2} ) → None.
functions.description: Set the vertex location from an array.

functions.name: set_vel
functions.signature: itasca.vertexarray. set_vel ( data: array float{vertex , 2} ) → None.
functions.description: Set the vertex velocity from an array.

functions.name: vel
functions.description: Get a numpy array of the vertex velocity.
